_metadata.description: Eval results for baseline architecture with naive last token encoding and incompatible cosine + variance loss (VICReg)
architecture_flaws: Loss formulation contradictions: VICReg arbitrarily stretches student magnitudes to achieve variance without penalizing invariance
Target manifold bottleneck: Extracting only the non-semantic, anisotropic final step token rather than the reasoning sequence
